content.en:
The Abyssal Land is moving!"

Gu He Yuanzu said excitedly.

The other Eight Extremes Realm and the Eternal Realm were also looking at the Abyssal Land, ready to enter the Abyssal Land at any time.

Bang!!!!

From the prohibition to the movement, the abyssless land is also a moment of time~.

At the moment when it was moving rapidly, Ye Tian and the other Eight Extremes Realm and those Eternal Realm lords shuttled into the Abyss Land one after another.

......

The Abyssal Land.

This is the floating island terrain, similar to floating islands suspended in the void-zone.

Moreover, there are still Void Beasts in the void, and these Void Beasts are in a semi-void state, sometimes revealing their true bodies, sometimes almost transparent, constantly switching between the two states.

Be careful, there's a Void Beast here!"

An Eternal Realm reminded.

At this time, an Eight Extremes Realm was curious: "Didn't you say that the Void Beasts were all wiped out, I didn't expect that there would be so many Void Beasts!"

Wiped out?" Gu He Yuanzu sneered: "How could the Void Beasts be killed, it's just that the battle millions of years ago made the Void Beasts in the Void Region of the space-time territory almost disappear, and there are still a large number of Void Beasts in the depths of the Void Region, even the Immortal Realm Lords don't dare to rashly enter the depths of the Void Region, otherwise why do you think those lords don't develop the territory in the depths of the Void Region?"

The Eight Extremes immediately stopped talking, obviously a bit embarrassing for such a statement.

Whoa!!!

Those Eternal Realm Lords flew away from the other direction, obviously not staying with Gu Heyuan Ancestor and them.

Gu Heyuan Ancestor said: "According to the contract, we must act together, although I have not been to the Abyssless Land, but I also have a little understanding of the Abyssal Land, the Abyss Land will not only give birth to many rare resources, but also a kind of material, which is bound to exist, that is, the Void Golden Marrow Wood! The Void Golden Marrow Wood can give birth to the Void Fruit, and the Void Beast is born from the Void Fruit." The Void Golden Marrow can increase the chance of fusing the innate eternal rules, which is equivalent to increasing the chance of breaking through to the Eternal Realm, let's go find the Void Golden Marrow first, everyone has no opinion, right?"

No comment!"

Everyone agreed to Gu Heyuanzu's proposal.

After all, treasures like the Void Golden Marrow Wood are also what they want, for these Eight Extremes Realm, the biggest possibility is to break through to the Eternal Realm, and thus help break through to the Eternal Realm Resource Treasures, they are extremely eager for it, even if it can increase the chance a little bit, it is also excellent.

Whoa!!

Everyone flew towards an island in Gu Heyuanzu, to see if there was any Void Golden Wood there.

Abrupt.

The six Void Beasts rushed towards Ye Tian and them.

Be careful, Void Beasts can neutralize attacks, and their strength is no weaker than that of ordinary Immortal Realm Lords!"

Gu He Yuanzu reminded. I didn't look at the Void Beast, after all, the legend of the Void Beast was too terrifying

Immediately, dozens of Eight Extremes Realm joined forces to fight against these eight Void Beasts, and one attack after another bombarded the Void Beast's body, but when these attacks bombarded the Void Beast, the Void Beast became illusory, and part of the attack power was directly canceled out.

It, as if it can counteract any force.

Ye Tian knew very well that this was the innate power of the Void Beast.

The moment he saw the Void Beast, Ye Tian used the Copying Talent to probe the Void Beast's talent and saw a very special talent.

Void: Immortal Ancestral Fu

He actually has an immortal ancestral endowment!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

It was the first time he had encountered a creature with the level of an Immortal Ancestor, and his own Immortal Ancestor, or several Immortal Ancestors formed through the continuous fusion of the talents on the Black Mist Worm.

The Void Beast not only possesses the Immortal Ancestor-level Void, but also has the three major talents of Immortal Ancestor-level strength, defense, and speed.

That is, the wisdom of the Void Beast is low, otherwise, this race will be too terrifying, I am afraid that it will be enough to grow to the level of the Immortal Realm, and at that time, countless space-time territories and the Source Sea will not be able to compete with the Void Beast.

Copy!"

Ye Tian used his copying talent to copy the Void Beast's Immortal Ancestor, although the speed of copying was a little slower, he was barely able to copy.

Thundered!!!

The six Void Beasts fought with dozens of Eight Extremes Realm, they were able to release one after another waves of destruction light, each of which was enough to bombard the average Seven Extremes Realm powerhouse, even if the Eight Extremes Realm was attacked head-on, they would be injured.

However, dozens of Eight Extremes Realm had a numerical advantage, so they still suppressed the Void Beast.

However, Ye Tian and the others wanted to kill these six Void Beasts but couldn't.

At this time, Gu He Yuanzu proposed: "Use the formation method to temporarily trap them, and you can't be dragged by them." "

The other Eight Extremes Realm also agreed, so they began to arrange one formation after another, not seeking to trap them completely, but only to trap these Void Beasts for a while, and that would be enough.

The Eight Extremes Realm arranges formations very quickly, and as long as there are materials, they can build formations in almost a second.

Suddenly, a large array covered the six Void Beasts.

At the same time, these Eight Extremes Realms took out one by one Eternal Origin Weapons with the effect of sealing the void to directly block this area, allowing these six Void Beasts to break through the blockade formation one by one.

Let's go!"

Gu He Yuanzu hurriedly said.

Dozens of Eight Extremes Realm immediately shuttled away, and the six Void Beasts were temporarily trapped.

Soon, the group came to an island.

Although there are some resources on the island, there is no Void Golden Kernel.

Therefore, everyone left immediately, so as not to lose time.

As everyone went deeper into the Abyssal Land and encountered the Void Beast again, they all used the same method to trap it temporarily.

......... ，..... ，

Otherwise, in the Abyssless Land, it would be too difficult to get rid of the Void Beast.

Suddenly.

The crowd discovered a huge nest on an island.

The lair should be the place where the Void Beast was born, there must be a Void Golden Pulp Wood inside, let's go in!"

Gu He Yuanzu said excitedly.

Wow!!!

Everyone shuttled directly into this lair, as if they had come to another void.

Here, a leafless golden tree takes root inside the nest, and it has three fruits on it.

These three fruits are the three Void Fruits that give birth to the Void Beast.

Cut down this Void Golden Essence Tree, and I will take one-tenth of the Void Golden Pulp Tree obtained, and the rest will be yours!" Gu He Yuanzu said.

No problem!"

Everyone agreed.

Anyway, according to this division, they can also get a lot, and besides, they can't really break through by relying on the Void Golden Marrow Wood alone.

Besides, it was Gu He Yuanzu who brought them here, and they would not refuse Gu Heyuanzu's distribution plan.

The five of them cut down the Void Golden Marrow Wood, and the other Eight Extremes Realm was guarding at the entrance, so they must stop those Void Beasts, otherwise they would cut down the Void Golden Marrow Wood, and the Void Beasts would definitely perceive it and definitely come to stop us!" Gu He Yuanzu reminded everyone.

Immediately, Ye Tian and the others came to the entrance, preparing to block the Void Beast that came to the rescue, while Gu He Yuanzu and the other five Eight Extremes Realm began to cut down the Void Golden Marrow Tree.

Boom!

The felling began, and the Void Beasts that had spawned from this lair sensed it one by one and began to converge towards the factory. _
